---
about:
  template: jolla
  id: about-block
  image: "img/alger_img.jpg"
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/MohamedKeteb
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/mohamed-mehdi-keteb-782258229  
---

```{=html}
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@300;400;500;600;700&family=Amiri:wght@400;700&family=Cormorant+Garamond:wght@400;500;600&family=Tangerine:wght@700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
body { font-family: 'Quicksand', sans-serif !important; font-weight: 400; }
h1, h2, h3 { font-family: 'Quicksand', sans-serif !important; font-weight: 600; }
.navbar-brand-logo { display: none !important; }
main.content {
  position: relative;
  padding-bottom: 9rem;
}
</style>
```

::: {#about-block}
:::

```{=html}
<style>
.about-sep {
  border-top: 3px solid currentColor;
  opacity: 1;
  margin-top: 0.05rem;
}
.title-hover {
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: transform 0.3s ease;
  display: inline-block;
  line-height: 1.12;
}
.title-hover:hover {
  transform: scale(1.1);
}
.arabic-name {
  display: block;
  margin-top: 0.01rem;
  text-align: center;
  font-family: 'Amiri', serif;
  font-size: 0.6em;
  font-weight: 400;
  line-height: 1.1;
}
.subtitle-line {
  display: block;
  margin-top: 0;
  margin-bottom: -1.1rem;
  text-align: center;
  font-size: 0.38em;
  font-weight: 500;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: #0d3b66;
}
.theme-accent {
  color: #0d3b66;
}
.quarto-about-jolla .about-image {
  width: 260px !important;
  height: 260px !important;
  aspect-ratio: 1 / 1;
  object-fit: cover !important;
  border-radius: 24px !important;
}
.profile-art-note {
  position: absolute;
  right: 1.2rem;
  bottom: 1.2rem;
  z-index: 20;
  max-width: 15.5rem;
  margin: 0;
  padding: 0.42rem 0.68rem 0.48rem;
  border: 1px solid rgba(13, 59, 102, 0.18);
  border-radius: 12px;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(248, 244, 232, 0.95), rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.98));
  box-shadow: 0 6px 16px rgba(13, 59, 102, 0.06);
  text-align: center;
  backdrop-filter: blur(6px);
}
.profile-art-kicker {
  display: block;
  margin-bottom: 0.1rem;
  font-size: 0.5rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.12em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: #0d3b66;
}
.profile-art-artist {
  display: block;
  margin-bottom: 0.05rem;
  font-family: 'Tangerine', cursive;
  font-size: 1.5rem;
  line-height: 0.95;
  color: #7a4b2a;
}
.profile-art-meta,
.profile-art-title {
  display: block;
  font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
}
.profile-art-meta {
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  color: rgba(73, 80, 87, 0.9);
}
.profile-art-title {
  margin-top: 0.08rem;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #1f2f3d;
}
@media (max-width: 700px) {
  .profile-art-note {
    right: 0.75rem;
    bottom: 0.75rem;
    max-width: 14rem;
    padding: 0.4rem 0.62rem 0.45rem;
  }
  .profile-art-artist {
    font-size: 1.35rem;
  }
  .profile-art-meta {
    font-size: 0.7rem;
  }
  .profile-art-title {
    font-size: 0.74rem;
  }
}
</style>

<div class="text-center">
  <h1 class="title-hover">Mohamed M. Keteb<br><span class="arabic-name" lang="ar" dir="rtl">محمد مهدي كاتب</span><br><span class="subtitle-line">PhD Candidate in Statistics</span></h1>
</div>

```

::: {.text-center}
**PhD** candidate under [Prof. Pierre E. Jacob](https://pierrejacob.org/) @ [Department of Information Systems, Data Analytics and Operations](https://ido-department.essec.edu/) -- [ESSEC Business School](https://www.essec.edu/fr/).
:::

<span class="theme-accent">**Education**</span>: I graduated from [ENSAE Paris](https://www.ensae.fr/) - [Polytechnic Institute of Paris ](https://www.ip-paris.fr/) and completed a master's degree in [probability and statistics](https://www.imo.universite-paris-saclay.fr/fr/etudiants/masters/mathematiques-et-applications/m2/mathematiques-de-laleatoire/) at the [Institut des Mathématiques d'Orsay](https://www.imo.universite-paris-saclay.fr/fr/), Université Paris-Saclay. 
During my master's thesis, I worked with [Pierre E. Jacob](https://pierrejacob.org/) on unbiased Markov Chain Monte Carlo with couplings, and previously I was an intern with [Francesca Romana Crucinio](https://francescacrucinio.github.io/) on particle swarm optimization.

<span class="theme-accent">**Research interests**</span>: I work at the intersection of probability and statistics, with a main focus on methodological and theoretical aspects of Monte Carlo methods. Currently, I focus on unbiased estimation of log normalizing constant via path sampling and Markov chain coupling.

**contact me at** mohamed [dot] keteb [at] essec.edu 

**Office N.022** Nautile Building, Campus of Cergy

```{=html}
<div class="profile-art-note">
  <span class="profile-art-kicker">Profile Painting Reference</span>
  <span class="profile-art-artist">Niels Simonsen</span>
  <span class="profile-art-meta">(Copenhagen, 1807 – Frederiksberg, 1885)</span>
  <span class="profile-art-title">View of Algiers from Outside the Walls, c. 1840</span>
</div>
```
